word: H1080 - בְּלָא - bᵉlâʼ - bel-aw' - Wear out

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּלא

Transliteration: belâ'

Phonetic: bel-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Pael) to wear away, wear out
    1. to harass constantly (figuratively)

Origin: corresponding to H1086 (used only in a mental sense)

TWOT entry: 2631

Part(s) of speech: Verb
